subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen proclaimeth: Verily I say, that which is acceptable in this day and beloved in the sight of the Best-Beloved is humility and submissiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید براستی میگویم آنچه الیوم مقبولست و عند المحبوب محبوب خضوع و خشوع و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
